title: Apps
heading: Apps
intro: Games and apps from BarkinMad Studios.

sections.title: ZX Series
sections.description: Connected retro arcade games with shared achievements, leaderboards, BarkinMad Coins, and cross-game progression.

sections.title: Retro Games
sections.description: Standalone retro-inspired arcade games built around simple controls, quick sessions, score chasing, and classic pick-up-and-play gameplay.

sections.title: Darts Apps
sections.description: Mobile darts scoring and statistics apps for match play, party games, and practice sessions.

retro.title: Retro Arcade Collection
retro.intro: Standalone retro-inspired arcade games built around simple controls, quick sessions, score chasing, and classic pick-up-and-play gameplay.

sections.title: Classic Arcade Feel
sections.description: These games focus on fast restarts, readable action, high-score pressure, and retro visual style. Some are also part of the connected ZX Series, where achievements, leaderboards, and BarkinMad Coins can carry across supported games.

darts.title: Darts Apps
darts.intro: Mobile darts scoring and statistics apps for match play, party games, and practice sessions.
